title: selliguea proteus
intro: Selliguea proteus, also known as Polypodium pellucidum, is a type of fern commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selliguea proteus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional folk remedies in various forms, including ointments and salves.
